misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Someone mentioned me this again and yeah I feel it even more than ever. The way how Imu acts... WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1179 I think Usopp is wrong about Imu. Imu is probably s
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Someone mentioned me this again and yeah I feel it even more than ever. The way how Imu acts... WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1179 I think Usopp is wrong about Imu. Imu is probably someone who has always fought alone, who has won his battles alone. Don't forget, he will be the opposite of Joyboy. Just look at the mural. Look at how the World Government is structured. Imu tries to gain his own subordinates through terror/power, but he will never have what Joyboy had: a real alliance, friends, and strong cohesion. And against this alliance, Imu fought "alone" (you can't count the few people at the bottom), against the entire population. Imu tries to do the same with his 20 kings, as well as Gorosei, Holy Knights, and CD. Building up his own "Alliance". But ultimately, he still comes out alone. It's possible that Usopp's words triggered him, and he insists on showing Usopp how he won the previous battles. Ultimately, Imu is a lone wolf, cruel and brutal. All the abilities of the HK or Gorosei are thanks to him, but he can revert them, just like Yhwach can... Usopp shouldn't have said that; he's awakened a giant disaster... And the fact that Nika and Nidhogg are there also triggered the move what Imu did this chapter. — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2039077902046707969#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Imu is exactly what I wanted. Remember how many people said he was just a tentacled monster that wasn't agile or versatile(Muzan like opponent)? Imu is the complete opposite: - Insanely
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Imu is exactly what I wanted. Remember how many people said he was just a tentacled monster that wasn't agile or versatile(Muzan like opponent)? Imu is the complete opposite: - Insanely fast - Incredibly strong - Highly skilled (whether tail, legs, or arm) - Extremely versatile in terms of abilities And that's maybe 1%-10% of his abilities... That's crazy. Dude is truly the King of the world.

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1180 Sanji kicks Imu, but he block that attack also easily and attacks with his own black flames(leg). This cause a massive explosion in Elbaph!!
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1180 Sanji kicks Imu, but he block that attack also easily and attacks with his own black flames(leg). This cause a massive explosion in Elbaph!!

misc.text: 🚨 Rumor Alert 🚨 According to recent industry whispers, MAPPA is reportedly in talks to animate a new adaptation of #BERSERK (#ベルセルク), with a potential release window around late 2026 or early 2027. Nothing officially confirmed yet, but if true… this could be HUGE. 👀🔥 Stay tuned.
